posts.author: JorgeLopez (Jorge Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, has anyone been able to use an existing form from monday’s Workforms on a new board?
Seems like something we would be able to do easily. I see an option to duplicate a form within the existing board but I don’t see an option to move it to another board. Workforms doesn’t seem have the option to duplicate or apply forms to new boards. If this is not available, yet, it would be a great future feature.

posts.author: jaclynvogel (jaclyn vogel)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like to know the answer to this.
